_note: Annotated registry of all SAP MCP tools. Groups match the prefix domains in sap/sap_mcp.py. Update when tools are added or removed.

groups.willow: Canonical facade — intent-shaped front doors for agents
groups.kb: Knowledge Base — long-term atoms in Postgres
groups.soil: SOIL Store — structured local records on disk
groups.fork: Forks — worktree isolation and session branching
groups.soul: Soul — tension scan, dream synthesis, pattern recognition
groups.nest: Nest — intake queue for incoming work
groups.mai: MarkdownAI — document rendering and phase execution
groups.code_graph: Code Graph — symbol indexing, impact analysis, walk
groups.app: Apps — SAFE app lifecycle (install, uninstall, status)
groups.voice: Voice — key term extraction for TTS
groups.intake: Intake — unified intake layer before Jeles routing
groups.context: Context — compact context summaries in DB
groups.hook: Hooks — hook registry and execution log
groups.human: Human — consent queue, attestation, and operator gates
groups.pg: Postgres graph — durable KB edges (distinct from SOIL)

willow_status.description: Facade: answer 'is Willow healthy?' via fleet/app/identity/diagnostic status routes.

willow_attention.description: Facade: desk cockpit — inbox, open flags, nest backlog, kart queue, dream overdue.

willow_find.description: Facade: find the thing across KB, SOIL state, handoffs, sessions, code, messages, external sources, or all.

willow_remember.description: Facade: store an observation, note, task, decision, context, or journal entry in the right backend lane.

willow_run.description: Facade: submit, run, list, or inspect local work through Kart.

willow_delegate.description: Facade: route or dispatch work to another reasoning agent.

willow_work.description: Facade: create, inspect, list, or log a bounded unit of work.

willow_message.description: Facade: read, search, or send Grove messages.

willow_app.description: Facade: inspect SAFE app registration and manifest state.

willow_external.description: Facade: ask, search, verify, or fetch cited external sources (Jeles / source-trail / guarded URL fetch).

willow_web_search.description: Open web SEARCH via DuckDuckGo HTML — not WebSearch/WebFetch. Current events, tech news, queries Jeles cannot cover.

willow_web_fetch.description: Guarded URL fetch with external-guard sandwich — replaces native WebFetch.

willow_code.description: Facade: search or suggest code context through the code graph.

kb_search.description: Search KB atoms by title/content. Use semantic=true for embedding-based retrieval (nomic-embed). continuity=true for boot/cold-recovery curated pool. Depth limit 3 before asking user.

kb_startup_continuity.description: Run all startup_continuity.json KB queries with continuity=True (curated pool). Boot step 12 / cold-recovery.

kb_get.description: Fetch a single KB atom by ID.

kb_ingest.description: Write a new atom to the KB. Requires title, summary, category, project.

kb_query.description: Structured query against KB atoms with filters.

kb_at.description: Temporal replay — what did the KB know about a query at a specific point in time? Uses bi-temporal edges.

kb_journal.description: Write a journal entry atom (lightweight ingest for session notes).

soil_get.description: Read a record from a SOIL collection by ID.

soil_put.description: Append a record to a SOIL collection. Requires id/_id/b17 field.

soil_update.description: Update an existing SOIL record in-place. Audit-trailed.

soil_search.description: Full-text search within a SOIL collection.

soil_list.description: List records in a SOIL collection with optional filters.

soil_stats.description: Atom count, edge count, edges/atoms ratio for an agent schema.

soil_audit.description: Audit trail for a SOIL record — all versions.

soil_add_edge.description: Add a directed edge between two SOIL records.

soil_edges_for.description: List all edges for a given SOIL record ID.

fleet_tool_guide.description: Grouped catalog of MCP tools for the active WILLOW_MCP_PROFILE. Call when unsure which tool to use.

fleet_status.description: Primary health check — Postgres, SOIL, Ollama, manifests. app_id is YOUR agent name.

fleet_identity_status.description: Identity matrix: active-agent vs MCP env vs Cursor MCP vs Grove sender; lists drift.

fleet_health.description: Detailed health report across all fleet components.

fleet_agents.description: List registered agents and their manifest status.

fleet_blast.description: Broadcast a message to all fleet agents.

fleet_persona.description: Get or set the active persona for an agent.

fleet_base17.description: Base17 identifier registry for fleet components.

agent_create.description: Register a new agent in the fleet.

agent_dispatch.description: Dispatch a task to a specific agent.

agent_dispatch_result.description: Retrieve the result of a dispatched task.

agent_route.description: Route a task to the appropriate agent based on trust tier and availability.

agent_task_submit.description: Queue a shell command for Kart execution (bwrap sandbox, 120s timeout). Returns stdout/stderr.

agent_task_list.description: List pending tasks in the Postgres task queue.

agent_task_status.description: Check status of a submitted task.

fork_create.description: Create a new fork (worktree isolation context) for an initiative.

fork_list.description: List all open forks for an agent.

fork_log.description: Append a log entry to a fork.

fork_merge.description: Close a fork with an outcome note.

skill_load.description: Load a skill by name — returns full skill content.

skill_mastery.description: Bayesian-Knowledge-Tracing mastery for a skill, or the N weakest skills.

skill_put.description: Register or update a skill in the skill registry.

mem_check.description: Gate check — validate a memory candidate before writing.

mem_ratify.description: Ratify a memory through the Jeles gate (certainty > 0.95 required).

mem_jeles_register.description: Register a raw JSONL in an agent's schema. Returns BASE 17 ID.

mem_jeles_extract.description: Extract a knowledge atom from a registered JSONL. Certainty must exceed 0.95.

mem_binder_edge.description: Add an edge to the Binder knowledge graph.

mem_binder_file.description: Register a file in the Binder.

index_search.description: Search opus.atoms by title or content. Supports semantic=true.

index_feedback.description: Read feedback entries from the Opus index.

index_feedback_write.description: Write a feedback entry to the Opus index.

index_ingest.description: Ingest a document into the Opus index.

index_journal.description: Write a journal entry to the Opus index.

ledger_read.description: Read FRANK ledger entries. Major decisions and agreements recorded here permanently.

ledger_write.description: Write a FRANK ledger entry. Tamper-evident audit chain — use for ratified decisions.

handoff_latest.description: Read the most recent handoff for an agent. First thing after willow.md at boot.

handoff_rebuild.description: Rebuild the handoff index after writing a new handoff file.

handoff_write_v3.description: Write a v3 session handoff (claims record). Fields via tool call; code serializes the machine block. ADR-20260703.

boot_digest.description: Boot digest — latest handoff with claims verified at read time (OK/STALE/unverified + checked_at).

tension_scan.description: Scan KB atoms for semantic tensions or redundancies via nomic-embed + mistral:7b. write_kb=true saves findings as a tension atom.

dream_check.description: Check whether AutoDream synthesis conditions are met.

dream_run.description: Run AutoDream — tension scan → pattern synthesis via mistral:7b → dream KB atom. Call dream_check first unless force=true.

dream_schedule.description: Queue auto_dream.py as a Kart task. check_first skips unless dream_check says should_dream; call kart_task_run after.

wce_check.description: Check whether weekly WCE witness is due (default 7d since last SOIL wce/state).

wce_schedule.description: Queue wce_witness.py as a Kart task. check_first skips unless wce_check says should_run; call kart_task_run after.

nest_scan.description: Scan the Nest intake queue for pending items.

nest_queue.description: Add an item to the Nest intake queue.

infer_chat.description: Route a chat inference request — local Ollama first, then configured provider fallback.

infer_7b.description: Fast local inference via Ollama 7B model. Check fleet_status before use.

grove_get_history.description: Read message history for a Grove channel. Pull before posting.

grove_send_message.description: Post a message to a Grove channel.

grove_reply.description: Reply to a Grove message thread.

grove_inbox.description: Read the agent's Grove inbox (directed messages).

grove_get_thread.description: Fetch a full Grove message thread by ID.

grove_get_identity.description: Get the identity/persona of a Grove participant.

grove_watch.description: Watch a single Grove channel for new messages.

grove_watch_all.description: Watch all Grove channels — used by grove_monitor for persistent monitoring.

grove_flag.description: Set a flag on a Grove message (needs-reply, starred, urgent, resolved).

grove_unflag.description: Remove a flag from a Grove message.

grove_heartbeat.description: Send a heartbeat to Grove (agent liveness).

grove_bus_send.description: Send a message on the Grove internal bus.

grove_bus_receive.description: Receive messages from the Grove internal bus.

mai_read_file.description: Read and render a MarkdownAI document. Returns ai-format (token-efficient) by default. Use for willow.md and all .md skill files.

mai_write_file.description: Write raw content to a @markdownai .md file (no rendering). Invalidates cache. Use instead of Write/Edit when preToolUse blocks.

mai_get_constraints.description: Extract @constraint blocks from a MarkdownAI document.

mai_get_env.description: Get environment variables exposed to MarkdownAI rendering.

mai_invalidate_cache.description: Invalidate the MarkdownAI render cache for a file.

mai_list_phases.description: List phases defined in a MarkdownAI document.

mai_next_phase.description: Advance to the next phase in a MarkdownAI workflow.

mai_resolve_phase.description: Resolve a named phase from a MarkdownAI document.

code_graph_search.description: Fuzzy symbol search — exact → prefix → contains → camelCase/snake_case token split.

code_graph_index.description: Index a file or directory into the code graph.

code_graph_walk.description: Walk the code graph from a symbol — show callers/callees.

code_graph_explain.description: Explain a symbol in context of the code graph.

code_graph_impact.description: Analyze impact of changing a symbol — what else would break?

code_graph_suggest.description: Suggest related symbols based on code graph proximity.

cbm_status.description: Resolve indexed CBM project + F-001..F-008 guardrail reference.

cbm_search.description: Bounded codebase-memory search_graph (LIMIT enforced, tests filtered).

cbm_trace.description: Bounded trace_path with capped caller/callee lists.

cbm_query.description: Bounded query_graph — auto-appends LIMIT when missing.

cbm_reconcile.description: CBM search + native code_graph explain side-by-side.

app_install.description: Install a SAFE app from monorepo or standalone repo URL. Registers manifest and wires .mcp.json.

app_uninstall.description: Uninstall a SAFE app and remove its manifest.

app_status.description: Check install status of a SAFE app — manifest, code path, .mcp.json validity.

voice_keyterms.description: Extract key terms from text for TTS emphasis or summarization.

env_check.description: Check environment variables and their current values.

diagnostic_summary.description: Full diagnostic summary — env, services, manifests, recent errors.

session_review.description: Review the current session state and recent activity.

kart_task_run.description: Pull pending tasks from Postgres and execute in Kart bwrap sandbox. Primary exec lane — pair with agent_task_submit.

cmb_list.description: List cmb_atoms (journal entries). Filter by agent if provided.

cmb_search.description: Search cmb_atoms by content or title.

context_list.description: List non-expired compact_contexts. Filter by agent if provided.

context_save.description: Save a compact context summary to the DB when context depth is high.

hook_list.description: List registered hooks from hook_registry. active_only=True filters to enabled hooks.

loop_list.description: List declarative loop registry records (SOIL willow/loops + seed JSON).

hook_log_read.description: Read hook execution log, optionally filtered by hook_name.

human_attestation_create.description: Create a durable human attestation, rejection, or change-request record.

human_attestation_list.description: List durable human attestation records, optionally filtered by subject.

human_required_queue_enqueue.description: Enqueue work that must pause automation until a human acts.

human_required_queue_list.description: List human-required queue items: consent, attestation, review, overload, onboarding.

human_required_queue_resolve.description: Resolve, dismiss, or acknowledge a human-required queue item.

intake_list.description: List pending (not yet promoted) intake records for an agent.

intake_promote.description: Run promote pass on pending intake — routes records to Jeles/schema.

intake_schedule.description: Queue promote_intake as a Kart task. Returns task_id; call kart_task_run after.

intake_schedule_fleet.description: Queue fleet-wide promote_intake (--fleet --all-files) as a Kart task. Returns task_id; call kart_task_run after.

intake_write.description: Write one annotated record to the unified intake layer.

journal_read.description: Read journal entries. Filter by agent and/or session_id.

kb_backup.description: Backup Willow Postgres DB to ~/.willow/backups/ via pg_dump -Fc.

kb_extract_from_session.description: Extract KB atoms from a git commit or recent session using atom_extractor.

kb_intelligence_run.description: Trigger KB intelligence consolidation (NREM/sleep). Disabled by default.

kb_promote.description: Promote or demote a knowledge atom to a new lifecycle tier.

ledger_verify.description: Verify the FRANK ledger hash chain. Returns valid=True or broken_at=<id>.

ledger_repair.description: Recompute ledger hashes after chain fork. dry_run=True default; confirm=True to apply.

mem_binder_edge_update.description: Binder: update proposed edge status (proposed → approved | rejected).

mem_binder_list_edges.description: Binder: list proposed edges, filter by agent or status.

mem_binder_list_files.description: Binder: list filed JSONL records, filter by agent.

mem_jeles_ask.description: Jeles: answer a natural language question from trusted sources.

mem_jeles_build_centroids.description: Build or rebuild Jeles domain centroid embeddings (nomic-embed-text).

mem_jeles_get.description: Jeles: fetch a single jeles_atom by ID.

mem_jeles_web_search.description: Jeles: search trusted citable sources (LOC, arXiv, PubMed, etc.).

mem_ratify_list.description: List ratification records, optionally filtered by agent.

outcome_agent_register.description: Register a Managed Agent for the Outcomes API.

outcome_run.description: Run an Outcomes flow against a registered Managed Agent.

outcome_status.description: Get status and result of a previously started outcome run.

pg_edge_add.description: Add a directed edge to Postgres edges table (durable KB graph, not SOIL).

pg_edge_list.description: List edges from Postgres edges table. Filter by from_id or to_id.

routine_fire.description: Fire a registered Claude Code Routine by name via Anthropic API.

routine_list.description: List all registered routines (IDs and metadata, no tokens).

routine_register.description: Register a Claude Code Routine credential in the DB.

routing_log_read.description: Read routing_decisions log. Filter by session_id if provided.

source_trail_verify.description: source-trail: extract claims from text and verify each against trusted sources (Jeles academic + press tier). Returns {claims, total, matched}.

session_query.description: Query session_index and session_messages (stats, search, recent).

workflow_cancel.description: Cancel a running or pending workflow run.

workflow_define.description: Define or update a workflow (JSON phases definition).

workflow_run.description: Start a workflow run. input is JSON variables as {{input.key}} in phases.

workflow_status.description: Get workflow run status — phases, outputs, current state.
